steps.title: Recall the area of a square
steps.content: For a square with side length $s$, the area is $A = s^2 = s \cdot s$.

steps.title: Substitute the given side length
steps.content: The sail's side length is $8.75w$ meters, so $A = (8.75w)(8.75w)$.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A ($A=(w+8.75)(w+8.75)$): adds the numbers instead of multiplying; the side is $8.75w$, not $w+8.75$.
  • Choice B ($A=(4)(8.75w)$): that is a perimeter expression ($4s$), not an area.
  • Choice C ($A=(8.75w)(8.75w)$): correctly squares the side length $8.75w$.
  • Choice D ($A=(8.75/w)(8.75/w)$): divides instead of multiplies, so the units and value are wrong.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
